title: Vampires in Havana
overview: Scientists Werner Amadeus, son of Count Dracula, develops an anti-sun formula for vampires.  He moves to Cuba with his nephew Joseph Emanuel.  Joseph grows up drinking the formula and forgets his origin, becoming Pepe, a trumpet player mixed up with revolutionaries in 1933 Havana.  Soon he will be in the centre of a dispute for his uncle's formula between vampire factions from the USA: the Capa Nostra Society and from Europe: the Vampiro Group.
